title: nymphaea nouchali var. caerulea
intro: Nymphaea nouchali var. caerulea, also known as the blue water lily, is a variety of aquatic plant that belongs to the family of water lilies. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nymphaea nouchali var. caerulea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of this plant include extracts, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
